ddls:
CREATE TABLE "design_elements" (
  "modelId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design element */,
  "contentEntityClass" TEXT /* Classification of the design element */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the design element */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the design element */,
  "mirrorRotation" INTEGER /* Mirror rotation of the design element */,
  "mirrorAlignment" INTEGER /* Mirror alignment of the design element */,
  "isLink" INTEGER /* Whether the design element is a link */,
  "groupId" INTEGER /* Group ID of the design element */,
  "treatmentIdentifier" TEXT /* Treatment identifier of the design element */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the design element */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the design element (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the design element was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the design element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modelId")
)

CREATE TABLE "layouts" (
  "layoutId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layout */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the layout */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layout */,
  "createdBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Date the layout was created */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the layout */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the layout (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the layout was last updated */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Thumbnail image URL of the layout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layoutId")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_projects" (
  "projectId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the design project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design project */,
  "createdBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Date the design project was created */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the design project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the design project (e.g., in progress, completed, archived) */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the design project was last updated */,
  "client" TEXT /* Client name or organization */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline of the design project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projectId")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "userId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, designer, reviewer) */,
  "lastLogin" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "profilePicture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio or description of the user */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("userId")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatmentId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "createdBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Date the treatment was created */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the treatment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the treatment was last updated */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Thumbnail image URL of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatmentId")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_element_layouts" (
  "designElementId" INTEGER /* ID of the design element */,
  "layoutId" INTEGER /* ID of the layout */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the design element in the layout */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the design element in the layout */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the design element in the layout */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the design element in the layout */,
  "relative" INTEGER /* Whether the design element is relative to the layout */,
  "rotation" REAL /* Rotation of the design element in the layout */,
  "drawingOrder" INTEGER /* Drawing order of the design element in the layout */,
  "fillOrder" INTEGER /* Fill order of the design element in the layout */,
  "blendMode" INTEGER /* Blend mode of the design element in the layout */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Whether the design element is locked */,
  "hidden" INTEGER /* Whether the design element is hidden */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the placement was last updated */,
  "zIndex" INTEGER /* Stacking order of the design element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designElementId", "layoutId")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_project_layouts" (
  "designProjectId" INTEGER /* ID of the design project */,
  "layoutId" INTEGER /* ID of the layout */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designProjectId", "layoutId")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "userId" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "designProjectId" INTEGER /* ID of the design project */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the user for the design project (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("userId", "designProjectId")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "commentId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "designElementId" INTEGER /* ID of the design element being commented on */,
  "userId" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Date the comment was left */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commentId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_designElementId FOREIGN KEY ("designElementId") REFERENCES design_elements ("modelId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_userId FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES users ("userId")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedbackId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "designElementId" INTEGER /* ID of the design element being given feedback on */,
  "userId" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was last updated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback is resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedbackId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_userId FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES users ("userId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_designElementId FOREIGN KEY ("designElementId") REFERENCES design_elements ("modelId")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_element_tags" (
  "designElementId" INTEGER /* ID of the design element */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag assigned to the design element */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designElementId", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "layout_tags" (
  "layoutId" INTEGER /* ID of the layout */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag assigned to the layout */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layoutId", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_project_tags" (
  "designProjectId" INTEGER /* ID of the design project */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag assigned to the design project */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designProjectId", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "searchId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "userId" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "searchQuery" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "searchResults" TEXT /* Results of the search */,
  "searchDate" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "lastUpdatedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "lastUpdatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time the search was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("searchId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_userId FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES users ("userId")
)
